'''√ch-dh-z''' ('''chadhaza''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:magadize|magadize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-dh-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:magadize|magadize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √ch-dh-z
|-
! Lemma
| chadhaza
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || chadhazithi || chadhaziji || chadhazishi || chadhazi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || chadhazuthuth || chadhazujuj || chadhazushush || chadhaz
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || chadhazuthu || chadhazuju || chadhazushu || chadhazu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || chadhazufuth || chadhazufuj || chadhazufush || chadhazuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || chadhazethe || chadhazeje || chadhazeshe || chadhaze
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || chadhazothoth || chadhazojoj || chadhazoshosh || chadhaz
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || chadhazotho || chadhazojo || chadhazosho || chadhazo
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || chadhazofoth || chadhazofoj || chadhazofosh || chadhazof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || chadhazïf || chadhazïf || chadhazïf || chadhazïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || chadhazïfïf || chadhazïfïf || chadhazïfïf || chadhazïfïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || chadhazïf || chadhazïf || chadhazïf || chadhazïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || chadhazïf || chadhazïf || chadhazïf || chadhazïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || chadhazæthæ || chadhazæjæ || chadhazæshæ || chadhazæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || chadhazathath || chadhazajaj || chadhazashash || chadhaz
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || chadhazatha || chadhazaja || chadhazasha || chadhaza
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || chadhazafath || chadhazafaj || chadhazafash || chadhazaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || chadhazasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || gochadhazasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || gokichadhazasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || chadhaznüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || gochadhaznknüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokichadhaznüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || chadhazshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gochadhaznkshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokichadhazshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || chadhazroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || gochadhaznkroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokichadhazroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || chadhazmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || gochadhaznkmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokichadhazmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || chadhazsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || gochadhaznksherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokichadhazsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || chadhazngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || gochadhaznkngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokichadhazngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || chadhazyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || gochadhaznkyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokichadhazyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || chadhazyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || gochadhaznkyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokichadhazyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || chadhaznüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gochadhaznknüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokichadhaznüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || chadhaznüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gochadhaznknüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokichadhaznüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || chadhaznümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gochadhaznknümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokichadhaznümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || chadhazshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gochadhaznkshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokichadhazshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || chadhazshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gochadhaznkshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokichadhazshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || chadhazshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gochadhaznkshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokichadhazshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || chadhazronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gochadhaznkronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokichadhazronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || chadhazroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gochadhaznkroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokichadhazroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || chadhazromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gochadhaznkromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokichadhazromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || chadhazmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gochadhaznkmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokichadhazmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || chadhazmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gochadhaznkmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokichadhazmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || chadhazmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gochadhaznkmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokichadhazmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || chadhaz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || chædhæz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || hochadhaz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || hochædhæz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || hohochadhaz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || hohochædhæz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || nüchadhaz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || nüchædhæz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || nünüchadhaz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nünüchædhæz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || nïchadhaz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || nïchædhæz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïchadhaz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïchædhæz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || luchadhaz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || luchædhæz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || luluchadhaz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || luluchædhæz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || lichadhaz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || lichædhæz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || lilichadhaz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || lilichædhæz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || kochadhaz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || kochædhæz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || kokochadhaz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kokochædhæz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || kechadhaz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || kechædhæz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || kekechadhaz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kekechædhæz
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
